title: AuditEvent
description: Single line of an append-only NDJSON audit log per ADR-006. The 14 closed event tags cover every stage transition the engine emits. The `tag` enum is the source of truth; consumers (Rust host, plugin workers, eval harness, replay verifier) MUST treat any unknown value as a hard error per ADR-005 closed-enum policy.

ts.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp; replay verifier checks monotonic ordering per stage.

report_id.description: Stable run id; matches the directory under .polyref/runs/<report_id>/.

stage.description: Pipeline stage label (free-form within length cap; conventional values: 'extraction', 'graph_build', 'frontier', 'check', 'rewrite', 'reduce', 'report').

tag.description: Closed event-tag set per ADR-006. Lexicographic ascending order is the public contract (hard blocker F-2).

payload_hash.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the canonical-JSON serialization of the typed payload kept off-line. Replay verifier reconstructs the chain by recomputing each hash from cache.

evidence_pointers.description: Optional list of validated EvidencePointers under the run's evidence/ directory; never populated for events that touch held-out observations before the candidate decision (ADR-010).
